prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic overhead photo of a young South Asian man with short black hair lying in bed at night, centered on top of an enormous black smartphone that functions like a mattress. He is wearing a plain white T-shirt, resting on two beige pillows, covered from chest to feet by a thick plush beige blanket with heavy realistic folds, and holding a small dark smartphone with both hands as if scrolling before sleep. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur or anonymized patch while the hairline and ears remain visible. The giant phone screen beneath him glows dark blue and displays exactly 8 large social media/app icons arranged around his body: Instagram at upper left, Snapchat at top center, TikTok at upper right, Twitter/X-style bird icon on the left, YouTube icon below it, green Messages icon lower left, a partially visible blue-and-orange app icon near the lower left edge, and a partially visible multicolor circular app icon on the right edge. Surround the giant phone-bed with a cozy creator bedroom setup viewed from directly above: two wooden nightstands at the top left and top right, each with a warm cylindrical bedside lamp; on the left nightstand include a small potted plant, a camera, a camera lens, and a notebook; on the right nightstand include small camera lenses, dark tech accessories, and cables. On the floor around the bed include a rug on the left, an open laptop, headphones, a tripod or light stand, notebooks, a backpack, and a camera; on the right wooden floor include a notebook, pen, cable, small plant, and camera gear. Use warm amber lamp light mixed with cool phone-screen glow, realistic shadows, shallow cinematic contrast, detailed fabric texture, reflective glass phone edges, 35mm editorial photography look, vertical 3:4 composition, no text overlays, no watermark. Customize the phone screen glow as dark blue with neon app glows, the blanket as warm beige, the room lighting as warm cozy night lighting, and the device scale as bed-sized smartphone.
